name: google-reviews
description: Integration with Google Business Profile to fetch and analyze live customer reviews.

tools.name: fetch_recent_reviews
tools.description: Fetch the 10 most recent Google reviews for the business location.

parameters.minRating: number (optional) - filter by minimum star rating

tools.name: reply_to_review
tools.description: Post a response to a specific Google review.

parameters.reviewId: string - the ID of the review
